title: Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir
tagline: Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir, Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Bara Mandir (हनुमान-ताल मन्दिर) is a historic Jain temple in Jabalpur, India, right on the edge of Hanumantal, once the main center of Jabalpur.
overview.description: Bara Mandir (हनुमान-ताल मन्दिर) is a historic Jain temple in Jabalpur, India, right on the edge of Hanumantal, once the main center of Jabalpur.

topPlaces.name: Jabalpur
topPlaces.description: Jabalpur (IPA: [d͡ʒəbəlpʊɾ]), formerly anglicised as Jubbulpore, is a city situated on the banks of the Narmada River in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. Jabalpur is the administrative headquarters of the Jabalpur district and the Jabalpur division.

topPlaces.name: Saugor and Nerbudda Territories
topPlaces.description: The Saugor and Nerbudda Territories, was a region of British India, located in the central part of present-day Madhya Pradesh state in central India. It included the present-day districts of Sagar (Saugor), Damoh, Jabalpur, and Narsinghpur.

topPlaces.name: Hitkarini Sabha
topPlaces.description: Hitkarini Sabha (Hindi: हितकारिणी सभा) is a historic, educational, non-profit organization located in the city of Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India. It is runs some of the oldest academic institutions in the region.

topPlaces.name: Mata Gujri Mahila Mahavidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Mata Gujri Mahila Mahavidyalaya also known as Mata Gujri College is an autonomous college located in Jabalpur. The college was established in the year 1994 and named after the mother of Guru Gobind Singh, Mata Gujri.

topPlaces.name: Rani Durgawati Museum
topPlaces.description: Rani Durgawati Museum is a museum in Jabalpur city in Madhya Pradesh state of India. It was established in 1976.

topPlaces.name: Pandit Ravishankar Shukla Stadium
topPlaces.description: Ravishankar Shukla Stadium is a cricket ground in Durg, Chhattisgarh. The hosted its first match between Madhya Pradesh cricket team against Uttar Pradesh cricket team in 1979.

topPlaces.name: Ravishankar Shukla Stadium
topPlaces.description: Ravi Shankar Shukla Stadium is the main sports venue in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. It is used for several sports, like association football and cricket.

topPlaces.name: Jabalpur division
topPlaces.description: Jabalpur Division is an administrative geographical unit of Madhya Pradesh state of India. Jabalpur is the administrative headquarters of the division.

items.note: Jabalpur (IPA: [d͡ʒəbəlpʊɾ]), formerly anglicised as Jubbulpore, is a city situated on the banks of the Narmada River in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. Jabalpur is the administrative headquarters of the Jabalpur district and the Jabalpur division.

The Saugor and Nerbudda Territories, was a region of British India, located in the central part of present-day Madhya Pradesh state in central India. It included the present-day districts of Sagar (Saugor), Damoh, Jabalpur, and Narsinghpur.

Hitkarini Sabha (Hindi: हितकारिणी सभा) is a historic, educational, non-profit organization located in the city of Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India. It is runs some of the oldest academic institutions in the region.

Ravishankar Shukla Stadium is a cricket ground in Durg, Chhattisgarh. The hosted its first match between Madhya Pradesh cricket team against Uttar Pradesh cricket team in 1979.
Ravi Shankar Shukla Stadium is the main sports venue in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. It is used for several sports, like association football and cricket.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jabalpur Airport (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Jabalpur Junction (0 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hanumantal Bada Jain Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jabalpur, Saugor and Nerbudda Territories, Hitkarini Sabha, Mata Gujri Mahila Mahavidyalaya, Rani Durgawati Museum.
